label: p7_7_higher_k_omega_fix
notes: P7.7 sweeps both bundle Laplacian (P7.6 path) and H_4-projected scalar metric Laplacian (P7.5 path) over (k, test_degree).
Bundle Laplacian basis is fixed by the AKLP bundle b_lines (degrees 0 and 1) and is independent of test_degree; only k affects it (via the metric background).
Scalar-metric Laplacian basis depends on both k (sample cloud) and test_degree (max total degree of the test-function basis).
